name: ATS-Mini Remote Repo
subtitle: Repository for the ATS-Mini Remote iOS app
description: An AltStore/Feather compatible source for the ATS-Mini Remote iOS application.

apps.name: ATS-Mini Remote
apps.subtitle: Remote control for ATS-Mini Receiver
apps.localizedDescription: Control your ATS-Mini receiver over Bluetooth LE. Tune frequencies, manage presets, visualize spectrum/waterfall, and perform OTA firmware updates.

versions.localizedDescription: Initial iOS release with optimized iOS 26 SwiftUI layout adjustments, featuring native glass button styles and ViewThatFits dynamic type wrapping.
Rolling release that automatically points to the latest build from the main branch.
